name: Unitas Holdings Limited
summary: Unitas Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides corporate finance advisory services primarily to listed and non-listed companies in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. It operates through Corporate Finance Advisory Service; Dry Bulk Shipping and Logistic Services; and IP Automation and Entertainment Business segments. The company advises on the listing rules, growth enterprise market (GEM) listing rules, and takeovers codes; mergers and acquisitions activities; other corporate activities, such as fund raising exercises; and corporate resumptions, as well as acts as an independent financial adviser to transactions of listed issuers that are under the listing rules, GEM listing rules, and takeovers codes. It also provides automation gift machines, thematic game machines, and carnival game booths, as well as retails outlet. The company was formerly known as Chanceton Financial Group Limited and changed its name to Unitas Holdings Limited in October 2016. Unitas Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
